projectDescription: A research-first agent framework for building reproducible LLM agents with a clean AgentModule + Engine kernel, built-in tracing, and benchmark-ready workflows.
keyFeatures: AgentModule + Engine kernel: clean separation of policy and execution for reproducible research
Built-in run tracing with manifest, events, and steps artifacts per run
qita board: web UI for run overview, trace inspection, step replay, and HTML export
Canonical agent patterns: ReAct, PlanAct, Tree-of-Thought, Reflexion out of the box
Kit toolkit: parsers, memory adapters, critics, planners, and tool sets
Benchmark adapters: GAIA, Tau-Bench, and CyBench runners on the same kernel
Skill system for extending agents with third-party capabilities via qit CLI
Task + Env abstraction with structured budget, resource validation, and lifecycle management
publicApiSurface: AgentModule (init_state, prepare, build_system_prompt, decide, reduce, should_stop, run)
qita board / qita replay / qita export (CLI)
